title: Mama Luigi is an effective marketing campaign
description:
Mama Luigi puts Yoshi to bed, and tells him a story of a land filled with Koopa Koopa football playas, and Fire-sumos, and with only a few simple steps, you too can produce mass-viewed viral videos. Click here for more information: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tm8eTmJ-0ZY

Ensure that your content can be discovered easily, by tagging it with the terms ‘viral’, ‘reddit’ and ‘shrek’. This will ensure maximum exposure. Engage your audience, keep the conversation flowing, suck a few dicks at Comic-Con and pay Facebook for fake views! You too can transcend beyond reality and reach the promised land.

An example of an amazing viral video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3IkPW8P4iI4

All it takes is the right know-how, passion and dedication. Content production and distribution is only a few million hours away with these five thousand steps. It’s somewhat easy maybe!
